ddl.value:
CASE
    WHEN ((type)::text = 'file'::text) THEN ((file_media_type IS NOT NULL) AND (file_url IS NOT NULL))
    ELSE true
END
ddl.name: file_fields_required_if_type_is_file

ddl.value:
CASE
    WHEN ((type)::text = 'reasoning'::text) THEN (reasoning_text IS NOT NULL)
    ELSE true
END
ddl.name: reasoning_text_required_if_type_is_reasoning

ddl.value:
CASE
    WHEN ((type)::text = 'source_document'::text) THEN ((source_document_source_id IS NOT NULL) AND (source_document_media_type IS NOT NULL) AND (source_document_title IS NOT NULL))
    ELSE true
END
ddl.name: source_document_fields_required_if_type_is_source_document

ddl.value:
CASE
    WHEN ((type)::text = 'source_url'::text) THEN ((source_url_source_id IS NOT NULL) AND (source_url_url IS NOT NULL))
    ELSE true
END
ddl.name: source_url_fields_required_if_type_is_source_url

ddl.value:
CASE
    WHEN ((type)::text = 'text'::text) THEN (text_text IS NOT NULL)
    ELSE true
END
ddl.name: text_text_required_if_type_is_text

ddl.using:
((current_setting('request.jwt.claims'::text, true) IS NULL) OR (EXISTS ( SELECT 1
   FROM archive.bank_connection
  WHERE ((bank_connection.plaid_item_id = bank_account.plaid_item_id) AND (bank_connection.user_id = ( SELECT ((current_setting('request.jwt.claims'::text, true))::json ->> 'sub'::text)))))))
ddl.name: agent_select_own

ddl.using:
((current_setting('request.jwt.claims'::text, true) IS NULL) OR (EXISTS ( SELECT 1
   FROM (archive.bank_account
     JOIN archive.bank_connection ON ((bank_connection.plaid_item_id = bank_account.plaid_item_id)))
  WHERE ((bank_account.plaid_account_id = bank_balance.plaid_account_id) AND (bank_connection.user_id = ( SELECT ((current_setting('request.jwt.claims'::text, true))::json ->> 'sub'::text)))))))
